name: LectServe
tagline: Look up Anglican/ACNA and Revised Common Lectionary Bible readings by date
description: Retrieve daily and Sunday lectionary Bible readings for the ACNA or Revised Common Lectionary traditions, for today, the upcoming Sunday, or any specific date. No account or API key is required.

auth.hint: No credential required. This is a free public API maintained by an individual developer.

tools.name: get_today_lectionary
tools.description: Get the daily and Sunday lectionary reading payload for today, relative to US Central Time.

params.name: lect
params.description: Sunday/Red-Letter lectionary tradition to use: acna (default) or rcl.

params.name: dailyLect
params.description: Daily lectionary variant: acna-sec (civil calendar, default) or acna-xian (liturgical calendar).

tools.name: get_upcoming_sunday_lectionary
tools.description: Get the Sunday-only lectionary reading payload for the next upcoming Sunday relative to today.

params.name: lect
params.description: Sunday lectionary tradition to use: acna (default) or rcl.

tools.name: get_lectionary_by_date
tools.description: Get the daily and Sunday lectionary reading payload for a specific date.

params.name: lect
params.description: Sunday/Red-Letter lectionary tradition to use: acna (default) or rcl.

params.name: dailyLect
params.description: Daily lectionary variant: acna-sec (civil calendar, default) or acna-xian (liturgical calendar).
